pages.title: Safe Dev vs Live Layout Demo
pages.instructions: Same-origin demo pages. This is the most reliable layout test because GitHub Pages can iframe these files.

pages.title: Real Website Load Test
pages.instructions: Uses a stable public website that should load in a browser. If iframe behavior changes, the Open links still work.

pages.title: Screenshot Fallback Review
pages.instructions: Uses saved screenshots so reviewers can still compare work when Dev or Live blocks iframe embedding.

seedNotes.comment: Layout works. Review results should stay at the top of the page section, not follow me while scrolling.
Multiple reviewer notes need to be visible together so we can compare feedback quickly.
Screenshot fallback is useful when the iframe does not load.
